/usr/bin/ar qc libshared_lib.a "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/0-isupper.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/1-isdigit.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/10-print_triangle.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/2-mul.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/3-print_numbers.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/4-print_most_numbers.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/5-more_numbers.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/6-print_line.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/7-print_diagonal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/8-print_square.c.o" "CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/9-fizz_buzz.c.o" CMakeFiles/shared_lib.dir/_putchar.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libshared_lib.a
